attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT QN.person_id AS PERSON_ID,
  QN.fiscal_month AS FISCAL_MONTH,
  QN.interview_type AS INTERVIEW_TYPE,
  QN.rating AS RATING,
  QN.review_date AS REVIEW_DATE,
    to_date((lead(to_number(to_char(QN.review_date,'yyyymmdd')),1,47121231)over(partition by QN.person_id order by QN.person_id,QN.fiscal_month)),'yyyymmdd') as next_reveiw_date
FROM
  (SELECT person_id,
    EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date)
    || '/'
    || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') AS Fiscal_Month,
    rank() OVER (partition BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date)
    || '/'
    || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') ORDER BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date)
    || '/'
    || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0'), a.review_date DESC) AS ranks,
    (SELECT meaning
    FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values
    WHERE lookup_type = 'EMP_INTERVIEW_TYPE'
    AND language      = 'US'
    AND lookup_code   = b.type
    ) AS interview_type,
    (SELECT meaning
    FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values
    WHERE lookup_type = 'PERFORMANCE_RATING'
    AND language      = 'US'
    AND lookup_code   = a.performance_rating
    ) AS Rating,
    a.review_date
  FROM per_performance_reviews a,
    per_events b
  WHERE a.event_id = b.event_id
    --and   a.person_id in( 98873 ,98601)
  AND TRUNC(a.review_date, 'MONTH') >= to_date('01-10-2014', 'DD-MM-YYYY')
  ORDER BY 1,2,5
  ) QN
WHERE ranks = 1
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND REVIEW_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND NEXT_REVEIW_DATE > SNAPSHOT_DATE

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ORGANIZATION_ID
  ||'@'
  ||PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID  
  ||'@'
  || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID 
  ||'@'
  || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.JOB_ID as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID            AS PERSON_ID,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE   AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE AS NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE,
  PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.PERSON_ID                  AS PERSON_ID,
  PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.REVIEW_DATE                AS REVIEW_DATE
FROM PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS
select assignment_id as ASSIGNMENT_ID,change_date AS CHANGE_DATE,PROPOSED_SALARY_N  AS  PREV_PROPOSED_SALARY_N from per_pay_proposals

select VALUE.INPUT_VALUE_ID as INPUT_VALUE_ID,
ELMNT.input_currency_code AS INPUT_CURRENCY_CODE from PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F ELMNT,
PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F VALUE
where ELMNT.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID=VALUE.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID

SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.ORG_ENTRY_DATE as ORG_ENTRY_DATE , temp.ORGANIZATION_ID as ORGANIZATION_ID
FROM
(SELECT CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_org.effective_Start_date) AS ORG_ENTRY_DATE, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS ORGANIZATION_ID, 
    prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS PREV_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
    MAX(NVL(prev_org.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS ORG_EXIT_DATE

FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_org
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_org ON curr_org.assignment_id = prev_org.assignment_id
       AND curr_org.effective_Start_date > prev_org.effective_end_date
       AND curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID <> prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID
       
WHERE curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID, prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID) temp

GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, ORG_ENTRY_DATE, ORGANIZATION_ID
attributes.Lookup condition: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_I AND ORG_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND ORGANIZATION_ID = ORGANIZATION_ID_IN

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.JOB_ENTRY_DATE as JOB_ENTRY_DATE,temp.JOB_ID as JOB_ID
FROM
(SELECT CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_job.effective_Start_date) AS JOB_ENTRY_DATE, curr_job.JOB_ID AS JOB_ID, 
    prev_job.JOB_ID AS PREV_JOB_ID, 
    MAX(NVL(prev_job.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS JOB_EXIT_DATE

FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_job
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_job ON curr_job.assignment_id = prev_job.assignment_id
       AND curr_job.effective_Start_date > prev_job.effective_end_date
       AND curr_job.JOB_ID <> prev_job.JOB_ID
       
WHERE curr_job.JOB_ID IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_job.JOB_ID, prev_job.JOB_ID) temp

GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, JOB_ENTRY_DATE, JOB_ID
attributes.Lookup condition: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND JOB_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND JOB_ID = JOB_ID_IN

attributes.Lookup Sql Override: SELECT WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID as BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_RATING as PERF_RATING, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DFLT_RATING_PCT as DFLT_RATING_PCT, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.RATING_LEVEL_ID as RATING_LEVEL_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID as PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_REVIEW_TYPE as PERF_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.X_REVIEW_TYPE as X_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_NAME as TEMPLATE_NAME, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_ID as TEMPLATE_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE as DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PROCESS_FLG as PROCESS_FLG, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP

SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.GRD_ENTRY_DATE as GRD_ENTRY_DATE, temp.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID
FROM
(SELECT CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_grd.effective_Start_date) AS GRD_ENTRY_DATE, curr_grd.grade_id AS GRADE_ID, prev_grd.grade_id AS PREV_GRADE_ID, 
    MAX(NVL(prev_grd.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS GRD_EXIT_DATE

FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_grd
    LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_grd ON curr_grd.assignment_id = prev_grd.assignment_id
       AND curr_grd.effective_Start_date > prev_grd.effective_end_date
       AND curr_grd.grade_id <> prev_grd.grade_id
       
WHERE curr_grd.grade_id IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_grd.grade_id, prev_grd.grade_id) temp

GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, GRD_ENTRY_DATE, GRADE_ID
attributes.Lookup condition: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND GRD_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND GRADE_ID = GRADE_ID_IN

ports.expression:
IIF
((BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 
OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 880 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 1394 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3467 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3469),:LKP.LKP_GRE_ID
(SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID),X_ASS_ATTRIBUTE16 )

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT  CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE IS NULL THEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START  ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE  END AS ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE,
  PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.PERSON_ID               AS PERSON_ID,
  PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START              AS DATE_START,
  CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL THEN TO_DATE('47121231','YYYYMMDD') ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE END AS ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE
FROM PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATE_START <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE >= SNAPSHOT_DATE

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT CASE WHEN PEI_INFORMATION1 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' ELSE PEI_INFORMATION1 END AS ECR_FLAG
     , PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID
FROM PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO
WHERE INFORMATION_TYPE = 'JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW'--

SELECT paaf.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID,
 paaf.JOB_ID as JOB_ID, 
 paaf.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID,
 paaf.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID,
 paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
 paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE as EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
 FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf
 where paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG='Y'
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT paaf.ASS_ATTRIBUTE27 as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID,
  paaf.PERSON_ID            AS PERSON_ID,
  paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
  paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE   AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf,
per_person_type_usages_f pptu,
per_person_types ppt
where 
   paaf.person_id = pptu.person_id
and    ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id
and paaf.business_group_id=0
and ppt.user_person_type like 'Expatriate%'
and paaf.primary_flag='Y'
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

attributes.Lookup Sql Override:

 paaf.PAY_BASIS_ID as PAY_BASIS_ID,
 paaf.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID,
 paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
 paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE as EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
 FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf
 where paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG='Y'
attributes.Lookup condition: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE
